entity.summary: Multichain automated-market-maker decentralized exchange with deployments across X Layer, Blast, Plasma, Ink, Unichain, Soneium, Mode, Sonic, Merlin, BOB, ZetaChain, and other networks.
entity.notes: DefiLlama reports substantial current multichain TVL and non-zero recent DEX volume. The first-party URL is preserved as live_unverified because it timed out during this review pass. HEI consolidates chain-specific, AMM, and product source rows into one DyorSwap entity.

evidence.title: DyorSwap official website
evidence.notes: First-party domain preserved for identity and URL history. The endpoint timed out during this review pass, so official_url_status remains live_unverified rather than live_verified.

evidence.title: DyorSwap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry reports current multichain TVL and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: DyorSwap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus corroborates DyorSwap exchange identity across multiple networks; chain-specific and AMM source rows are consolidated into one HEI entity.
